summary: A coding agent harness for complex codebases that supports multiple AI models (Claude, GPT, Gemini) and integrates with IDEs like Cursor and VSCode for autonomous code generation.
usecases: Senior developers delegating routine code refactoring or bug fixes to AI agents while focusing on architecture
Startup teams accelerating MVP development by having agents handle boilerplate code across microservices
Technical educators teaching students advanced coding patterns through interactive AI-driven pair programming
ideas: Build a multi-agent swarm where specialized agents collaborate on different parts of a distributed system
Integrate with quantum computing simulators to optimize algorithm generation for future-proof code
Create a neural interface that translates brainwaves into code suggestions, enabling thought-to-code workflows
